title: Grand Prix de la Ville d'Alger
summary: The Grand Prix International de la ville d'Alger is a one-day race held annually in Algeria. It is rated as a category 1.2 event on the UCI Africa Tour. Prior to 2022, it was held as a stage race, and was on the 2018 UCI Africa Tour as a category 2.2 event.
text:
The Grand Prix International de la ville d'Alger is a one-day race held annually in Algeria. It is rated as a category 1.2 event on the UCI Africa Tour. Prior to 2022, it was held as a stage race, and was on the 2018 UCI Africa Tour as a category 2.2 event.
